/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpkg_srv__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/pkg_srv/libpkg_srv__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/pkg_srv__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/pkg_srv/srv/_mission_control_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/bridges/jetson_workspace/build/pkg_srv:/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libpkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libpkg_srv__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib
